features: Premium Quality Material: Our cotton tote bag is crafted from high-quality, 100% natural cotton material, ensuring durability and long-lasting use. Pack of 10 Size 38cm x 42cm handle length : 27cm, Decoration Area : 14” x 15”.

SPACIOUS ROOM FOR ITEMS: With ample room for all your essentials, this tote bag offers a spacious interior that easily accommodates groceries, books, gym gear, or anything else you need to carry with you.

Eco-Friendly Choice: Made from natural cotton fibers, our tote bag is an eco-conscious alternative to plastic bags, helping reduce waste and environmental impact. By choosing reusable cotton tote bags, you're contributing to a greener, more sustainable future.

Personalization Options: Whether you're a DIY enthusiast or a business owner looking to customize tote bags for promotional purposes, our plain cotton tote bag provides a blank canvas for your creativity. Add your own designs, logos, or slogans using fabric paints, markers, or screen-printing techniques.

Satisfaction Guaranteed: Unprocessed Natural Cotton Fabrics are subject to 5% - 10 % shrinkage when washed. To reduce shrinkage it is recommended to hand wash with cold water. If you're not completely satisfied with your purchase, simply contact us for a full refund or replacement. Your satisfaction is our top priority.
description: Introducing our versatile Plain Cotton Tote Bag, the perfect canvas for your creativity! Crafted from high-quality cotton, these blank tote bags are ideal for a wide range of uses, from everyday shopping to DIY crafting projects. Available in bulk quantities, these plain tote bags offer ample space for your unique designs and personal touches. Crafters and artists will love the blank canvas these tote bags provide for their creative endeavors. Whether you're into screen printing, embroidery, or sublimation, these plain tote bags are the perfect starting point for your next masterpiece. Made from durable canvas material, our plain canvas bags are built to last and withstand the rigors of daily use. Use them for grocery shopping, beach trips, or as eco-friendly alternatives to plastic bags. Looking for a sustainable option? Our natural cotton bags are eco-friendly and reusable, making them the perfect choice for environmentally conscious shoppers. Say goodbye to single-use plastic bags and make the switch to our fabric tote bags today! For those in the sublimation business, our sublimation tote bags offer endless possibilities for customization. Create unique designs that stand out and leave a lasting impression on your customers. Whether you're stocking up for your craft projects, promotional giveaways, or retail business, our plain tote bags are sure to meet your needs. Shop now and unleash your creativity with our versatile canvas and cotton tote bags!
